content.question: Although many people who have sleeping ___ either chronic or occasional...
...automatically reach for the sleeping tablets when they see a difficult night ___.
...there are a number of so-called 'folk' remedies which are not ___ cheaper but also much safer in the long run.
Most people have tried ___ a hot drink such as milk or one of a number of herbal infusions before going to bed...
...Before going to bed, run very cold water for several minutes over your forearms and legs from the knee ___...

content.original: Although John studied harder than anyone, he failed the exam.
content.answer: In spite of studying harder than anyone, John failed the exam.

content.original: What a pleasure to see you here!
content.answer: How pleasant to see you here!

content.original: It was only when I got home that I realised I had forgotten my keys.
content.answer: Not until I got home did I realise I had forgotten my keys.

content.original: This matter is no concern of yours.
content.answer: This matter does not concern you.

content.original: The only reason I am late is that the traffic was so heavy.
content.answer: Had it not been for the heavy traffic, I wouldn't be late.

content.original: I certainly don't mean to do it before tomorrow.
content.answer: I have no intention of doing it before tomorrow.

content.original: My boss says I can use his yacht whenever I want to.
content.answer: My boss has put his yacht at my disposal.

content.original: The news was a shock to us.
content.answer: We were taken aback by the news.

content.original: James realised that he could never be an architect.
content.answer: James realised that he was not cut out to be an architect.

content.original: They chose not to drive because they thought there would be too much snow.
content.answer: They chose not to drive for fear of there being too much snow.

content.original: I'm sick of that programme; I've watched it too often.
content.answer: I have gone off that programme because I've watched it too often.
I am always short of time.

content.original: They tried very hard to finish by midnight.
content.answer: They did their best to finish by midnight.

content.original: The criminal got away through the back window.
content.answer: The criminal made his escape through the back window.
